title: Automated Video Generator - Full Feature Demo
script:
Meet the Automated Video Generator. [Visual: logo-automation.png] [Transition: slide] [Grade: warm] [FadeIn: 0.3]
A completely free, open source text to video pipeline. [Visual: github-profile.png] [Grade: cinematic] [Style: top] [Color: yellow] [Volume: 0.8]
It turns any script into a professional short video. [Visual: ai coding code typing] [KenBurns: off] [Color: cyan]
With over four hundred voices and one hundred languages. [Visual: language voice translation] [FadeOut: 0.5] [Grade: vivid] [Voice: en-IN-ValluvarNeural]
Plus automatic stock footage and background music. [Visual: video editing timeline music] [Style: center]
Built with TypeScript, Node.js, and Remotion. [Visual: software developer workspace] [Transition: cut] [Music: bgm.mp3]
And it runs entirely on your own machine. [Visual: data center server rack]
Deploy your own AI video pipeline today. [Visual: rocket launch innovation success] [Transition: zoomblur]
